Travel & Stay Details - July 4 (Kolhapur) July 5 (Chitradurga) July 6 (Bangalore) - Hi, Please find below Taps, Hri and my travel and stay details for our road trip to Bglor in our car: *Day 1 - July 4th* (Saturday) 6am Departure from *Mahim* home 8am Breakfast at *Khalapur/Lonavala* Food Court 10.30am Coffee break at *Satara* Toll Plaza Food Court 1pm Lunch break at *Karad* Highway 3.30pm Reach *Kolhapur* Hotel KRISHNA The WOOD VILLA (Tel: 8010373673 ) 6pm *Mahalaxmi Temple* visit (10 min walking from Hotel) *Day 2 - July 5th* (Sunday) 8.30am Departure from *Kolhapur* Hotel 10.30am *Belgaon* stopover for Coffee break and Kunda purchase 1pm Lunch break at *Hubli *bypass 3.30pm Coffee break at *Davangere* 6pm Reach *Chitradurga* Hotel MYSPACE Chindanur Comforts (Tel: 9380653157 ) *Day 3 - July 6th* (Monday) 7.30am Departure from Chitradurga Hotel 9.30am Coffee break at Tum

Missed VITEEE-2026 Counseling - Dear VITEEE 2026 Candidate, Greetings from VIT Bhopal University! If you have appeared for VITEEE 2026 but could not participate in the counselling process, this is your final opportunity to become a part of the prestigious VIT family. A limited number of seats are available in selected programmes at VIT Bhopal University . We invite interested candidates to seize this opportunity and enroll in our future-ready academic programmes. Interested candidates may register immediately through the admission portal: https://admission.vitbhopal. ac.in/counselling Seats are limited and will be allotted on a first-come, first-served basis, subject to eligibility and availability.
